THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCLELLAND, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 6TH ST, #318, S.F, CA. $804.00 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $884.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PL. WILL WAIVE ALL RENT & DAMAGES & COSTS IF DEF. VACATES BY 9AM, 6-1-94. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. DEF. WARRANTS THERE IS NO OTHER OCCUPANT W/RIGHT OF POSSESSION.
